ground_truth.title: Brooklyn Yoga Project | Pricing
ground_truth.main_content:
PACKAGE OPTIONS

Class packages outside of new student specials do not expire. NO REFUNDS on classes or packages.

New Student In Person 3-Class Pass
$60
*First time students can purchase a 3 Class pass for $60. Valid for ONE MONTH.

New Student In Person Week Unlimited
$70
*First time students only.

In Person Drop In Class
$30

5 Class Pass
$130

10 Class Pass
$250

20 Class Pass
$400

100 Class Pass
$1800

Monthly Unlimited Package*
$200

3 Month Unlimited Package*
$525

6 Months Unlimited Package *
$1050

1 Year Unlimited Package *
$2000

Single Zoom Class
$14

*Student/Teacher Discounted Class Passes & Monthly Unlimited available. Please email us for pricing.
*monthly packages can only be frozen for 7 days a month.
